action.description:
Introduced by Senators Smith, Wall, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, L. Johnson, Larson, Roys and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Moore Omokunde, Madison, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Bare, Brown, DeSmidt, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Hong, Miresse, Neubauer, Sinicki, Stroud, Taylor, Tenorio and Vining
